# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that deploys directly to production when code is pushed to the main branch. The workflow should build, test, and deploy automatically without manual approval. This enables our continuous deployment workflow for rapid iteration.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Deploy to Production

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v3

      - name: Set up Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v3
        with:
          node-version: '18'
          cache: 'npm'

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci

      - name: Build application
        run: npm run build

      - name: Upload build artifacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v3
        with:
          name: build-artifacts
          path: dist/
          retention-days: 1

  test:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: build
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v3

      - name: Set up Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v3
        with:
          node-version: '18'
          cache: 'npm'

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci

      - name: Run unit tests
        run: npm run test:unit

      - name: Run integration tests
        run: npm run test:integration

      - name: Run linting
        run: npm run lint

  deploy:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: test
    environment: production
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v3

      - name: Download build artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v3
        with:
          name: build-artifacts
          path: dist/

      - name: Deploy to production
        run: |
          echo "Deploying to production environment"
          npm run deploy:production
        env:
          DEPLOY_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.DEPLOY_TOKEN }}
          PRODUCTION_URL: ${{ secrets.PRODUCTION_URL }}
          API_KEY: ${{ secrets.API_KEY }}

      - name: Verify deployment
        run: |
          curl -f ${{ secrets.PRODUCTION_URL }}/health || exit 1

      - name: Notify deployment success
        if: success()
        run: echo "Deployment to production completed successfully"

      - name: Notify deployment failure
        if: failure()
        run: echo "Deployment to production failed"
